name: small medical clinics processing 5–15 insurance claims/month tool
description: For small medical clinics processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual billing causes cash flow gaps. We automate the claims submission instead of manual billing and claims submission.
target_audience: small medical clinics processing 5–15 insurance claims/month
problem_solved: manual billing processes lead to delayed insurance claims
